title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Amazon India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Amazon India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amazon India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!
